sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the yellow bar to see if the all-blue pattern was matched.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("Orange elements:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

print("\nYellow elements:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

print("\nBottom-right outer cells:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] == 36:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        if min(rows) >= 36 and min(cols) >= 36:
            print(f"  ({min(rows)},{min(cols)}): {n['color']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
